caption: A person with short dark hair is visible in the top right corner of a screen recording, appearing in a small webcam overlay. The video displays a presentation on a computer screen, showing a digital document with diagrams and text. The first two frames show a section titled "01B Sustainable Local Food Demand," which includes a causal loop diagram with nodes like "Local Sustainable Farming" and "People's Health & Welfare," and text discussing a "Bale, Healthy But Expensive Food" loop. The scene then transitions to a different section of the document. The final two frames show a section titled "02B Sustainable Local Food Supply," which features a similar causal loop diagram and text discussing "market price" and the "Renewable Food Market Long Cycle." A browser toolbar with various open tabs is visible at the top of the screen throughout the clip.
